global_summary: Company is behind: 29 of 174 tasks done, tracking 31% of days versus plan. Every project trails plan on work-days, with Kyle Aubry and Ginger Brown deepest short. Cashflow holds, a botched paint job, and slipping MEP rough-ins are the main drags this week.

22NxUEJKTj6C.name: Ginger Brown
22NxUEJKTj6C.text: Only 3 work-days done vs 21 expected by today. Painting slipped from Fri Jul 10 to Sat Jul 18—the key task to land.

22PCPuWPndkt.name: Clifford Clack — Gym Addition
22PCPuWPndkt.text: 3 work-days done vs 12 expected; bricks stalled on cashflow, not bought today. Brick installation must land Sat Jul 11.

22PMwhcSuqJD.name: Karim-Merchant
22PMwhcSuqJD.text: 11 work-days done vs 16 expected; in-ground plumbing done, form board slipped. Place form board Mon Jul 13, then pre-pour inspection Tue Jul 14.

22PK9BhEJtZn.name: Lingyan Qiu (CNG2025-458)
22PK9BhEJtZn.text: 7.0 work-days short of plan (14.0 done · 21.0 expected by today; 3/29 tasks). Key slip: TILES: INSTALL TILES (Fri Jul 10 → Sat Jul 18, +8d).

22Nx8Uut2Qxs.name: Kyle Aubry - Project 01
22Nx8Uut2Qxs.text: 10 work-days done vs 19 expected, zero this week; painter botched texture and stained new windows. Carpet slipped to Thu Jul 23.

22PGVNmUgLww.name: Martha Cockrell (CNG-20251199)
22PGVNmUgLww.text: 49 work-days done vs 61 expected; framing stairs and one plumbing and electrical rough-in landed, but mechanical rough-in slipped to Wed Jul 15. Framing pushed to Tue Aug 4.

22PL9RSbYNs9.name: Rohini Williams (CNG2025-496)
22PL9RSbYNs9.text: 13 work-days done vs 16 expected, slightly behind; exterior sheathing done. Next: finish roof decking, then doors and windows Tue Jul 14.

22P2cmNJZcwJ.name: Stephanie and Marc Felton
22P2cmNJZcwJ.text: 24 work-days done vs 33 expected; interior paint done, electrical trim in progress on site. Install cabinet doors Mon Jul 13.

22P2j3sQMKqz.name: Katie Holmes & Sean Springs
22P2j3sQMKqz.text: 8 work-days done vs 10 expected; sheetrock hung and all three weekly tasks done. Next: tape, bed and texture Thu Jul 16.
